description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian with a punk-inspired appearance, featuring a mohawk hairstyle and a confident stance. The individual is dressed in a cropped short-sleeve jacket over a bralette, paired with tight, ripped pants and ankle boots. Accessories include a fingerless glove on one hand and a wide armband on the other, adding to the edgy urban look. The figure's posture is relaxed, with one hand resting on the hip and the other hanging by the side. The facial features are sharp and expressive, contributing to a bold street presence. The overall design suggests a character suited for contemporary urban environments.
description: A punk-inspired adult pedestrian with a mohawk, cropped jacket, bralette, ripped pants, and boots, accessorized with a glove and armband. The figure stands confidently with a relaxed, urban attitude.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mohawk, facial features, cropped jacket, bralette, and hand on hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the mohawk, cropped jacket, and glove on the left hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mohawk, jacket, pants, and the relaxed stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armband on the right arm and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped short-sleeve jacket, bralette, tight ripped pants, fingerless glove, wide armband
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip and relaxed stance
